---
title: "Refresh Market Data"
format:
    html:
      output: false
editor: source
---

## Energy Futures (from RTL::dflong)

Requires the RTL package. Run `remotes::install_github("risktoollib/RTL")` first
to get the latest data.

```{r}
library(RTL)
library(dplyr)
library(arrow)
library(here)

# Export RTL::dflong as feather — same schema as load_energy_data() returns
df <- RTL::dflong
df$market       <- sub("[0-9]+$", "", df$series)
df$contract_num <- as.integer(regmatches(df$series, regexpr("[0-9]+$", df$series)))

# Keep only markets used by the app
df <- dplyr::filter(df, market %in% c("CL", "BRN", "NG", "HO", "RB"))

arrow::write_feather(df, here::here("inst/extdata/energy_data.feather"))
message("Energy data: ", nrow(df), " rows — ",
        format(min(df$date)), " to ", format(max(df$date)))
```

## EIA Weekly Data (requires EIA_KEY env var)

Set your API key first: `Sys.setenv(EIA_KEY = "your-key-here")`

```{r}
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(tibble)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(purrr)
library(arrow)

EIAkey <- Sys.getenv("EIA_KEY")

get_eia_series <- function(series_id, label, role) {
  url <- paste0("https://api.eia.gov/v2/seriesid/", series_id,
                "?api_key=", EIAkey)

  res <- httr::GET(url)
  js  <- jsonlite::fromJSON(httr::content(res, "text", encoding = "UTF-8"))
  d   <- js$response$data

  tibble(
    role  = role,
    label = label,
    date  = d$period %>%
      sub("T.*$", "", .) %>%
      lubridate::parse_date_time(orders = c("Ymd", "Y-m-d", "Ym", "Y")) %>%
      as.Date(),
    value = as.numeric(d$value)
  ) %>%
    arrange(date)
}

tickers <- tribble(
  ~role,                ~series_id,                          ~label,
  "gasoline_supply",    "PET.WGFRPUS2.W",                   "Gasoline Production (kb/d)",
  "gasoline_demand",    "PET.WGFUPUS2.W",                   "Gasoline Product Supplied (kb/d)",
  "crude_stocks",       "PET.WCESTUS1.W",                   "U.S. Crude Stocks (kbbl)",
  "padd1_crude_stocks", "PET.WCESTP11.W",                   "PADD 1 Crude Stocks (kbbl)",
  "padd2_crude_stocks", "PET.WCESTP21.W",                   "PADD 2 Crude Stocks (kbbl)",
  "padd3_crude_stocks", "PET.WCESTP31.W",                   "PADD 3 Crude Stocks (kbbl)",
  "padd4_crude_stocks", "PET.WCESTP41.W",                   "PADD 4 Crude Stocks (kbbl)",
  "padd5_crude_stocks", "PET.WCESTP51.W",                   "PADD 5 Crude Stocks (kbbl)",
  "refinery_runs",      "PET.WGIRIUS2.W",                   "Refinery Runs (kb/d)",
  "cl_demand",          "PET.WRPUPUS2.W",                   "Total Petroleum Product Supplied (Mbbl/d)",
  "ho_demand",          "PET.WDIUPUS2.W",                   "Distillate Product Supplied (Mbbl/d)",
  "rb_exports",         "PET.W_EPM0F_EEX_NUS-Z00_MBBLD.W", "Motor Gasoline Exports (Mbbl/d)",
  "ng_storage",         "NG.NW2_EPG0_SWO_R48_BCF.W",       "US Natural Gas Storage (Bcf)",
  "rig_count",          "PET.E_ERTRC_XR0_NUS_C.W",         "Baker Hughes US Rig Count"
)

eia_data <- purrr::pmap_dfr(tickers, function(role, series_id, label) {
  message("Fetching: ", label)
  tryCatch(
    get_eia_series(series_id, label, role),
    error = function(e) { message("FAILED: ", label, " - ", e$message); NULL }
  )
}) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(value), date >= as.Date("2007-01-02"))

arrow::write_feather(eia_data, here::here("inst/extdata/eia_data.feather"))
message("EIA data: ", nrow(eia_data), " rows")
```

## US Treasury CMT Yields (FRED via tidyquant)

```{r}
library(tidyquant)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(arrow)

cmt_tickers <- c(
  "DGS1MO", "DGS3MO", "DGS6MO", "DGS1", "DGS2", "DGS3",
  "DGS5", "DGS7", "DGS10", "DGS20", "DGS30"
)

tenor_map <- c(
  DGS1MO = 1,  DGS3MO = 3,   DGS6MO = 6,
  DGS1   = 12, DGS2   = 24,  DGS3   = 36,
  DGS5   = 60, DGS7   = 84,  DGS10  = 120,
  DGS20  = 240, DGS30 = 360
)

raw <- tidyquant::tq_get(cmt_tickers, get = "economic.data", from = "1990-01-01")

cmt_data <- raw |>
  dplyr::rename(series = symbol, value = price) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    market       = "CMT",
    contract_num = unname(tenor_map[series])
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(value)) |>
  dplyr::select(date, series, market, contract_num, value)

arrow::write_feather(cmt_data, here::here("inst/extdata/cmt_data.feather"))
message("CMT data: ", nrow(cmt_data), " rows — ",
        format(min(cmt_data$date)), " to ", format(max(cmt_data$date)))
```
